
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"a":[{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"b":[{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}}],"c":[{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"d":[]},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"location":{"language":"English"}},"path":["a",0,"details"]},{"data":{"location":{"language":"German"}},"path":["a",1,"details"]},{"data":{"location":{"language":"Ukrainian"}},"path":["a",2,"details"]},{"data":{"location":{"language":"Dutch"}},"path":["a",3,"details"]},{"data":{"location":{"language":"English"}},"path":["a",4,"details"]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
